flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Arkansas Northeastern College fell 44% between 2009 and 2010 (24.6% → 13.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arkansas Northeastern College fell 100% between 2019 and 2022 (13.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Arkansas Northeastern College fell 56% between 2009 and 2012 ($9.2k → $4.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Arkansas Northeastern College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (54.4% → 64.0%).
